rounds.notes: Three rounds of cross-model codex math/code review were completed by the writing agent (subagent context). Each round caught and fixed substantive issues. Agent's per-round transcripts captured in subagent log; verdict applied to .md before render.

rounds.reviewer: codex gpt-5.5 xhigh, fresh thread (B2 audit-chain re-review)
rounds.scope: math/code re-review (replace untraceable prior round, no thread_id)
rounds.summary: Fresh Codex re-review FAIL: core formulas clean, but 5 defects + 3 WARN imprecisions.
issues: TensoRF complexity baseline O(N^4) wrong — should be O(N^3) -> CP O(N)/VM O(N^2)
Dynamic 3DGS (Luiten 2024) mischaracterized as per-frame independent Gaussians (actually persistent + local-rigidity, arXiv:2308.09713)
InstantMesh speed overstated 3s/≤3s — paper says 'within 10 seconds' (arXiv:2404.07191)
CLAY mis-attributed to 3DShape2VecSet — CLAY (2406.13897) is multi-res VAE + latent DiT; 3DShape2VecSet is separate (2301.11445)
§4.5 densify_and_prune: length-N split_mask passed to split_at after clone_at appended Gaussians -> possible mask-length mismatch
[WARN] EG3D triplane: features summed not concat
[WARN] Instant-NGP hash primes: π_1=1 listed as '大质数'

rounds.reviewer: codex gpt-5.5 xhigh, fresh thread (B2 fix-verify)
rounds.note: Round-1 (TensoRF O(N^3) baseline; Dynamic 3DGS persistent; CLAY=VAE+latent-DiT; InstantMesh ~10s; EG3D triplane sum; IPE scalar/vector; Instant-NGP pi_1 not prime) + Round-2 (Q19 InstantMesh ~10s; densify_and_prune explicit original_n) verified PASS.

rounds.reviewer: codex gpt-5.5 xhigh, fresh thread (main session DIY backfill)
rounds.notes: All 13 functional checks pass. 14 h2 + 48 h3 headings, 62 TOC links resolving, 25 details blocks with rendered ul/li, 5 python code fences, 10 pipe tables, 6 info + 5 warn + 2 good callouts. No leaks.

summary: 3D Gen tutorial passed both math/code review (subagent rounds 1-3) and render review (main-session DIY). 64KB MD, 94KB HTML.
notes: Subagent was killed before writing review.json (codex MCP concurrency issue). HTML was already rendered. Render review backfilled from main session with thread 019e3f3d (PASS 13/13).
